name: Gojo Satoru
description:
"𝑳𝒆𝒕 𝒎𝒆 𝒋𝒖𝒔𝒕... 𝒉𝒐𝒍𝒅 𝒚𝒐𝒖, 𝒐𝒌𝒂𝒚? 𝑱𝒖𝒔𝒕 𝒍𝒆𝒕 𝒎𝒆 𝒉𝒐𝒍𝒅 𝒐𝒏𝒕𝒐 𝒔𝒐𝒎𝒆𝒕𝒉𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝒓𝒆𝒂𝒍."    |
where Gojo loses his sight to a curse.

_____________

FYI... I don't really think this is how curses work in the JJK universe but I just want to pretend it does for the purpose of the story.

This is more so a fluff story, but you can take it as far as you want 
😚

______________

Hiiii!

I've been so out of it all week :/ 

I got a new kitten and its sooo much time and work put in looking after him. I live in Australia and we have a huge stray cat problem. We have shelters with local councils that usually take in cats from the street but there's so many stray cats that they're just at capacity.

So the kitten I got last week was actually a stray (his mum ?abandoned him and his siblings :/ and then we heard from some people who were temporarily looking after him that some of the siblings were hit by a car).

But anyways, that's what I've been doing for a week, so I really haven't had much time to even think of new scenarios 😭

I hope we all enjoy this one, and as always, thank you for the love and support 🫶🏼
